alkylation reagent: Samples were reduced with TCEP, alkylated with iodoacetamide, and further reduced with DTT.
cleavage agent: Samples were digested overnight at room temperature with Lys-C, followed by digestion with trypsin for 6 hours at 37 °C.
instrument: Peptides were analyzed on an Orbitrap Eclipse Mass Spectrometer.
labeling: we performed tandem mass tag affinity purification mass spectroscopy (TMT-AP-MS, Supplementary Fig. 9a).
reduction reagent: Samples were reduced with TCEP, alkylated with iodoacetamide, and further reduced with DTT.
